reason: Same locked contract — check agent verifies code against R-STREAM-FIX / R-WARMUP-INIT / R-INTEGRATION-TEST and the Q1-Q4 decisions.
Hard rules to verify against (SPDX header, _Strict base, atomic writes, no embed/vector/sqlite-vec mentions).

Subprocess isolation + lazy-import pattern. Check that the threaded loop inside the subprocess still keeps babeldoc lazy-loaded and that the daemon-thread cleanup is clean (no leaked threads on subprocess exit).
Verify ErrorEvent path from warmup failures + traceback truncation matches the boundary-error discipline.
Verify the adapter rewrite still appends only to conversation-log.jsonl, never wiki/log.md.
API reference — verify the warmup wrapper actually targets the documented babeldoc.assets.assets.async_warmup / httpx.AsyncClient surface.
